hero.name: Andres Porras
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Building modern web experiences with 6+ years of expertise in React, Node.js, Java, and beyond. Based in Ontario, Canada — ready to build something great.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: The story behind the code
about.bio_1: I'm a Full Stack Developer based in Ontario, Canada with over 6 years of experience building web applications, from WordPress sites serving thousands of users to full-stack MERN applications.
about.bio_2: My journey started in Colombia, where I led IT operations at a school and built websites for diverse clients. In 2023, I moved to Canada and graduated with Honours from Algonquin College's Computer Programming program. I'm currently volunteering as a developer with Landseed.ca, a Canadian platform connecting tiny house enthusiasts with landowners.
about.bio_3: I bring a unique combination of technical skills and design sensibility — I'm comfortable with Figma and Illustrator just as much as with React and Node.js. I'm also trilingual, speaking English, French, and Spanish.
